QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING (Cybersecurity) 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 44 HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 120+ RECRUITERS 10+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAM SCOPE Computer Science Engineering with a specialization in Cybersecurity addresses the rising demand for secure digital systems amid growing cyber threats

. The program blends core computer science with advanced security skills to prepare students for real-world challenges. Graduates are equipped to combat AI-driven attacks, quantum risks, and global cyber warfare, ensuring resilient and secure digital environments. LEARNING SCOPE The scope of learning in CSE(Cybersecurity) program is designed in alignment with global standards, combining core computer science subjects with specialized training in areas like ethical hacking, cryptography, cyber forensics, and secure software development. Students gain hands-on experience in advanced labs, learn tools and techniques from global leaders like EC-Council

. Students gain hands-on experience in advanced labs, learn tools and techniques from global leaders like EC-Council. The program also builds expertise in programming (C, Python, Java Full Stack, MERN Stack) and covers key compliance frameworks such as GDPR, HIPAA, and ISO 27001. Delivered by industry-trained faculty, it equips students to tackle evolving cyber threats with confidence. CAREER PROGRESSION Graduates of CSE(Cybersecurity) program are in high demand across MNCs, government agencies, and specialized cybersecurity firms. Career roles include Cybersecurity Analyst, Ethical Hacker, Security Architect, and Cloud Security Engineer, among others. They are also well-suited for roles in defense sectors or for pursuing higher studies

. They are also well-suited for roles in defense sectors or for pursuing higher studies. VISION To be a globally prominent academic department for high-quality education in the domain of Cybersecurity with ethical values and social commitment. MISSION Impart quality education and comprehensive technical skills in Cybersecurity through innovative teaching-learning practices and industry-driven faculty expertise. Establish state-of-the-art computing facilities and foster industry collaborations to promote skill enhancement, innovation, entrepreneurship, and quality research. Inculcate ethical values, social responsibility, and professional leadership skills through student-centric activities for the betterment of society

. Inculcate ethical values, social responsibility, and professional leadership skills through student-centric activities for the betterment of society. PROGRAM DETAILS Program Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will establish successful careers as cybersecurity professionals by applying technical expertise to secure digital ecosystems and address evolving cyber threats. PEO2: Graduates will enhance their skills, adapt to emerging cybersecurity advancements, pursue lifelong learning, and contribute to society with ethical values and social responsibility. PEO3: Graduates will demonstrate innovation, research capabilities, entrepreneurship, and leadership skills in developing solutions for real-world cybersecurity challenges

. Program Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required

. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment

. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences

. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Program Specific Outcomes PSO1: Demonstrate expertise in open-source cybersecurity tools and frameworks. PSO2: Develop innovative security solutions by integrating emerging technologies such as AI, blockchain, and quantum cryptography

. PSO2: Develop innovative security solutions by integrating emerging technologies such as AI, blockchain, and quantum cryptography. PSO3: Implement Secure Software Development Lifecycle (SSDLC) principles for robust cybersecurity solutions. Dr.S.Yasotha M.E., Ph.D D.O.J : 01.03.2021 Areas of Specialization Wireless Sensor Network,Web Application and Development Dr. S.Yasotha has 14 years of experience in Engineering Education. She has received her master’s in VLSI Design from Anna University, Coimbatore and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Government College of Technology, Coimbatore. Her research areas include Wireless Sensor Networks, Computer Networks, Web Application Development. She has published 10 research papers in reputed International Journals and IEEE conferences. She acted as Co-Chair in conferences. She has mentored Students and developed projects for industries. She has a life time membership of ISTE

. She acted as Co-Chair in conferences. She has mentored Students and developed projects for industries. She has a life time membership of ISTE. Dr.S.K.Harikarthik Ph.D D.O.J : 22.06.2023 Areas of Specialization Software Engineering, Software Testing,Computer Networks Dr.S.K.Harikarthik has 17 years of experience in Engineering Education. He has received his Bachelor’s in Information Technology from Kumaraguru College of Technology, Master’s in Information Technology from Anna University and PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. His research area includes Software Engineering and Networks. He published research papers in reputed Journals and Conferences. He had been the Session Chair, and Panellist in several conferences

. He published research papers in reputed Journals and Conferences. He had been the Session Chair, and Panellist in several conferences. He guided 30+ Undergraduate and Postgraduate Projects for Anna University and Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University students. He is nominated as Program Advisory Committee member for formulating syllabus for the Computer Engineering department of Nachimuthu Polytechnic College, Pollachi. He is life time member in ISTE and he acted as Nodal officer for Anna University examinations

. He is life time member in ISTE and he acted as Nodal officer for Anna University examinations. Ms.B.Suchithra M.E.,M.B.A., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 26.07.2021 Areas of Specialization Data Structures and Algorithms, OOPS Networks and Cyber Security Ms Suchithra is working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering. She has completed her B.Tech and M.E in Computer Science Engineering domain at Anna University, Chennai. She has obtained her MBA in Human Resources Management from Bharathiyar University. She is a Gold Medalist in both her UG & PG programs. She is currently pursuing her research in Space Data Analytics at Anna University

. She is a Gold Medalist in both her UG & PG programs. She is currently pursuing her research in Space Data Analytics at Anna University. She has a teaching experience of 13 years, a technology enthusiast and a researcher, who has published 20 papers and 10 patents to her credit, out of which 2 patents have been granted. She has authored two books in Artificial Intelligence & Cyber Security. Her areas of specializations are Data Structures and Algorithms, Object Oriented Programming with Java, Networks and Cyber Security. She is a Wipro Certified Faculty and is recognized as the mentor for Project Based Learning (PBL) in Java Full Stack from Wipro Technologies, Bangalore

. She is an Advanced Technology Certified Faculty and has won Faculty Hackathon conducted by Wipro Technologies, Bangalore. She is an Intel Certified Instructor for Intel Rendering Toolkit, for Machine Learning, for oneAPI C SYCL Essentials and for CUDA to C SYCL. She is a Saptang Labs trained Cyber Security Faculty. She is a Cybercrime Intervention Officer and a Cybercrime Incident Responder. She is receiving a funding of $500 for the establishment of WiCyS Student Chapter and is a faculty mentor of WiCyS – SECE Student Chapter. She is an AWS certified faculty too. She has served as a resource person & a keynote speaker at various events. She is the reviewer of “International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering (ICECCME)”

. She is the reviewer of “International Conference on Electrical, Computer, Communications and Mechatronics Engineering (ICECCME)”. She is a lifetime member of ISTE and IETE. She remains as a Director Board Member in many student startups. She is the SPOC for British Petroleum Mentoring. Mr.R.Karthick M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Algorithm Design and Optimization, Machine Learning, NLP Mr.R. Karthick is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sri Eshwar College of Engineering, Coimbatore. He holds a B.Tech. in Information Technology and an M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, and is currently pursuing a Ph.D. at Galgotias University

. in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University, and is currently pursuing a Ph.D. at Galgotias University. He brings over nine years of academic experience and two years in industry, with expertise in Android development and Java technologies. He has completed NPTEL certifications in Cloud Computing and Python for Data Science and has been trained in Outcome-Based Education (OBE). He has filed five patents under IPR, Govt. of India, and has published six SCOPUS-indexed journal papers and twelve IEEE and ACM international conference papers. He has technical proficiency in Android, iOS, and web application frameworks. He is an active member of ACM, IAENG, IFERP, and ICSES. He has served as an LMS (Moodle) developer and trainer

. He is an active member of ACM, IAENG, IFERP, and ICSES. He has served as an LMS (Moodle) developer and trainer. He also delivered a two-week virtual training program for students on problem-solving and programming using C and Python at the University of Kadiri, Indonesia. Ms.B.Gomathi M.E., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 22.08.2019 Areas of Specialization Cognitive Radio Network,Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Ms.B.Gomathi has received her Bachelor’s Degree and Master’s Degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Anna University. She is currently pursuing her PhD in Information and Communication Engineering under Anna University, Chennai

. She is currently pursuing her PhD in Information and Communication Engineering under Anna University, Chennai. She has 5years of Experience in Engineering education and her research areas include Cognitive Radio Networks, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Deep Learning. She has published 5 papers in reputed IEEE conferences and Journal. She has published 4 patents and she has authored 3 books. She is a Lifetime Member of ISTE. In her career span, she is trained by industry and possesses an expertise in Saleforce CRM. Mr.S.Arul Prakasham M.E D.O.J : 19.09.2019 Areas of Specialization Core Java and cyber security Mr. S. Arul Prakasham has five years of experience in Engineering Education

. S. Arul Prakasham has five years of experience in Engineering Education. He obtained his Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Computer Science and Engineering from Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology. He also brings three years of professional experience as a Mainframe Developer at Tata Consultancy Services, where he specialized in COBOL programming and the maintenance of high-volume enterprise systems, developing a strong foundation in software reliability and structured problem-solving. Currently, he is enhancing his expertise in emerging technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, and Full Stack Development, with a focus on integrating his experience in robust legacy systems with modern, scalable, and intelligent computing solutions

. Ms.K.S.Dharani M.E D.O.J : 23.07.2025 Areas of Specialization Machine Learning Ms. Dharani K S is a dedicated academician and researcher who holds a Master of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering with a specialized focus on Cybersecurity. With an academic background featuring a CGPA of 8 from Sri Eshwar College of Engineering and a B.E. from Vivekanandha College of Engineering for Women, she combines technical expertise with a passion for classroom teaching and curriculum development. Her research contributions include a published paper in IEEE Xplore regarding Machine Learning-based cardiovascular disease prediction and presentations on vehicular accident monitoring at international conferences

. Technically proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, and HTML/CSS, she is also certified in C by the Spoken Tutorial Project, IIT Bombay. Her professional profile is further distinguished by achievements in Java8 and PHP, as well as specialized training in bioinformatics software tools, reflecting a comprehensive commitment to advancing the fields of network security and computer engineering. Ms.S.Thirisha M.Tech Areas of Specialization Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Machine Learning, Database Management Systems, Cyber Security, Software Engineering. Thirisha S is an enthusiastic and dedicated academic professional with an M.Tech in Software Engineering from Vellore Institute of Technology

. Thirisha S is an enthusiastic and dedicated academic professional with an M.Tech in Software Engineering from Vellore Institute of Technology. Passionate about teaching and emerging technologies, she specializes in Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Machine Learning, Database Management Systems, and Full Stack Development. She has worked on multiple innovative projects involving AI/ML, Generative AI, computer vision, and web application development. Her technical expertise includes Python, Java, MySQL, REST APIs, React, data analytics, and cloud-related technologies. She is particularly interested in applying AI-driven solutions to real-world problems and guiding students in practical project development

. She is particularly interested in applying AI-driven solutions to real-world problems and guiding students in practical project development. With strong communication and problem-solving skills, she aims to create an interactive and industry-oriented learning environment for students. Her areas of academic interest include Artificial Intelligence, Data Analytics, Generative AI, and Intelligent Software Systems.
